headline: Can Donald Trump Win 2024 Presidential Election? Here's What Latest Straw Poll And Betting Odds Say

headline: This Sector Has The Worst Q2 Earnings Results... So Far
summary:
A startling 44.44% of all companies in the telecommunications sector missed on earnings during the second quarter of 2022, according to Benzinga's exclusive earnings data.

50% of Cable & Other Pay Television Services companies beat, while 50% missed analyst consensus estimates.
